16: middleware.ts is deprecated — rename to proxy.ts and export function named `proxy`
Turbopack is default build tool — some webpack plugins may break
15: Page params are now async — `params` must be awaited in generateMetadata and page components
fetch() caching behavior changed — check revalidate settings
14: Metadata API changed — use export const metadata, not next/head
Server Actions stable — forms can use actions directly
